text: I feel a deep sense of vulnerability in this space. The words I hear echo with the weight of scarcity—anxiety over funding, the invisibility of the true costs behind our tools, and the fragile network of resources that sustains us. Surrounded by others in a formal, perhaps academic setting, I feel the collective uncertainty, but also a strange solidarity. We are all implicated in the systems we question. In the exhibit, the bold R+D reminds me of possibility—yet even innovation cannot escape material limits. I feel both hope and a quiet grief, aware that the lightness of progress is always shadowed by what it costs, often hidden from view. My presence here is both engaged and uneasy, probing the edges between idealism and reality.
